releaseNotes:
1. [Fix] Critical: API format for OpenClaw is restored to standard OpenAI (`openai-completions`), resolving complete connection failures on Gateway hot-reloads.
2. [Fix] Remote Bridge startup args now correctly include `--allow-unconfigured` to unblock fresh OpenClaw 0.17+ deployments from halting mid-flight.

Enjoy the seamless AI agent experience! (v3.4.4 skipped)
